examples:
Command Example
!fortisiem-get-events-by-incident incID=1919 maxResults=3
Context Example
{
"FortiSIEM.Events": [
{
"Destination Host Name": "google-public-dns-a.google.com",
"Event Name": "Permitted traffic flow started",

!fortisiem-get-events-by-incident incID=1919 maxResults=3
Context Example
{
"FortiSIEM.Events": [
{
"Destination Host Name": "google-public-dns-a.google.com",
"Event Name": "Permitted traffic flow started",
"Destination IP": "8.8.8.8",
name: fortisiem-get-events-by-incident

outputs.description: Event type. FortiSIEM.Events.EventID FortiSIEM Event ID.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.EventType

outputs.description: Raw Event Log. FortiSIEM.Events.ReportingDevice Reporting Device.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.RawEventLog

outputs.description: Event received timestamp. FortiSIEM.Events.EventName Event Name.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.EventReceiveTime

outputs.description: Reporting IP address. FortiSIEM.Events.SystemEventCategory System Event Category.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.ReportingIP

outputs.description: Name of raw event parser. FortiSIEM.Events.HostIP Host IP address.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.EventParserName

outputs.description: Host name. FortiSIEM.Events.FileName Name of the file associated with the event.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.HostName

outputs.description: Name of the process associated with the event. FortiSIEM.Events.JobName Name of the job associated with the event.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.ProcessName

outputs.description: Event status. FortiSIEM.Events.DestinationPort Port of the traffic’s destination.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.Status

outputs.description: Port of the traffic’s origin. FortiSIEM.Events.DestinationIP Destination IP address for the web.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.SourcePort

outputs.description: IP address of the traffic’s origin. The source varies by the direction: In HTTP requests, this is the web browser or other client. In HTTP responses, this is the physical server. FortiSIEM.Events.ExtendedData All additional data returned by FortiSIEM.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.SourceIP

outputs.description: Interface of the traffic’s destination. FortiSIEM.Events.NATTranslation NAT source port.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.DestinationInterface

outputs.description: tcp: The protocol used by web traffic (tcp by default). FortiSIEM.Events.SourceMAC MAC address associated with the source IP address.
outputs.name: FortiSIEM.Events.Protocol
